message:
🐛 Fix Nodes page stats to match compute dashboard block IDs

Update getStatValue to handle correct stat block IDs (nodes, cpus, memory,
pods, etc.) instead of legacy IDs (healthy, warnings, errors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
